{{Quote|The Empire's medical branch operates in surgical theaters and aboard naval warships near planetary battlefields. Their knowledge has been used to develop new methods of biological warfare.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen]], ''[[Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''|<ref name="Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Imperial Surgical Corps''' was a medical branch of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
The Surgical Corps operated in surgical theaters and aboard naval warships near planetary battlefields. The branch also were key to developing new methods of biological warfare due to the members' knowledge in medicine.

[[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] surgeons wore turquoise blue uniforms and helmets with breathing filters that partially covered their faces. They utilized a wide variety of operating gear and a small network of medical [[Computer/Legends|computers]] that aided in monitoring the patient's condition.

==History==
[[Kornell Divini]] was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the Imperial Surgical Corps.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
